certificate.permits_boundary:
permits:
  exec: false
  tools: ["nika:jq", "nika:notify", "nika:read", "nika:uuid", "nika:write"]

# review — effects too dynamic to pin statically:
#   · task `queue` uses a dynamic path — `fs` cannot express 'any path'; add the resolved path(s) before running
#   · task `escalate` reaches a dynamic URL — `net.http` cannot express 'any host'; add the resolved host(s) before running
#   · task `board` uses a dynamic path — `fs` cannot express 'any path'; add the resolved path(s) before running
